WorkspaceConfig.title: WorkspaceConfig
WorkspaceConfig.description: Persistence layer for the owner's Google target Sheet/Doc settings

targetId.description: The Google Sheets or Docs resource identifier

targetTitle.description: Display title of the linked target

targetUrl.description: Active web URL of the linked resource

workspaceType.description: Type of resource: sheets or docs

synced.description: Flag representing whether it has been pushed to Google Workspace

/workspace_config/{configId}.description: Global config for Google Sheets and Docs live integration sync target
